reviews.review_description: Didn't know what was going on, I couldnt get a grasp on the story, but the quality is alright, and it's 3d iirc.

reviews.review_title: Mystical, worth watch with swivel chair
reviews.review_description: Empowering all-women story, which is not common to see here. Interesting use of the immersive 360 environment which makes you be the center of attention and so the circle of women around you becomes more mystical... you need to watch it sitting on a swivel chair to better get the experience, though... Interaction is minimal but it offers this pocket stories that add to the main storyline, which means you can/should watch it a couple of times to get it all.
